◎简　　介  

　　Jules Claus hates Christmas! After his father died last year, he no longer wants anything to do with the ‘most wonderful time of the year’. While his mother is working, Jules is spending a lot of time in his grandfather’s toy shop.One day he finds a magic snow globe, which brings him to the farthest corners of the world in a magical way.
